# YourScrap - Scrap Pickup Service in Coimbatore
> Turn old scrap into instant cash with free doorstep pickup in Coimbatore.

## Core Business
- **Name:** YourScrap
- **Location:** Coimbatore, Tamilnadu
- **Services:** Free scrap pickup, scrap buying, recycling service
- **Phone:** +919080405581
- **Website:** https://yourscrap.in/

## Services Offered
- Iron Scrap Pickup: ₹18-25/kg
- Steel Scrap Pickup: ₹20-30/kg
- Copper Scrap Pickup: ₹350-450/kg
- Aluminum Scrap Pickup: ₹80-120/kg
- Paper Scrap Pickup: ₹6-12/kg
- Plastic Scrap Pickup: ₹8-15/kg
- E-Waste Collection: Price varies
- Office Scrap Collection: Bulk pickup available

## Coverage Areas
Coimbatore, Peelamedu, Gandhipuram, RS Puram, Singanallur, Saravanampatti, Ukkadam, Vadavalli, Saibaba Colony, Kuniyamuthur

## Key Features
- Free doorstep pickup (orders above 10kg)
- Same-day pickup available
- Instant payment via UPI/Cash
- Digital weighing for transparency
- Weekend and weekday service
- Best market rates guaranteed
